message:
feat(connectors): standardize surface_status taxonomy, expand integration tests, add E2E verification scripts

Surface status taxonomy: Migrate huggingface, tlon, zalo, zalouser
connectors from ad-hoc surface_status values (live, planned_only) to
standardized 'incubating' with surface_status_rationale explaining
readiness state.  Manifests and tests updated.

discord, slack: Cargo.toml dependency adjustments.

Integration tests: Expand AWS, GCP, S3 connector integration test
coverage.

E2E scripts: New aws_connector_verification.sh and
gcp_connector_verification.sh for end-to-end connector validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:huggingface-first-slice"
 id = "fcp.huggingface"
 name = "Hugging Face"
 version = "0.1.0"
-status = "stub"
+status = "incubating"
 description = "Hugging Face inference router connector for OpenAI-compatible chat completions and model discovery"
 archetypes = ["request-response"]
 format = "native"

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:tlon-first-slice"
 id = "fcp.tlon"
 name = "Tlon"
 version = "0.1.0"
-status = "stub"
+status = "incubating"
 description = "Tlon / Urbit connector for authenticated DM and channel send flows"
 archetypes = ["bidirectional"]
 format = "native"

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalo-first-slice"
 id = "fcp.zalo"
 name = "Zalo"
 version = "0.1.0"
-status = "stub"
+status = "incubating"
 description = "Zalo Bot API connector for bot identity, outbound send, long polling, and webhook management"
 archetypes = ["bidirectional", "polling", "webhook"]
 format = "native"

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalouser-first-slice"
 id = "fcp.zalouser"
 name = "Zalo User"
 version = "0.1.0"
-status = "stub"
+status = "quarantined"
 description = "Guarded helper-process connector for Zalo personal account automation"
 archetypes = ["cli-process"]
 format = "native"
